settings.heading: The Pursuit of Honest Luxury
settings.body: The inception of Demetti began with a shared observation of a broken system. We were disillusioned by an industry where price tags were untethered from reality—often reaching a ten times markup. We are a team of three who believe a garment’s essence lies in its architecture. By dismantling traditional retail overhead and working directly with premier mills, we offer uncompromising quality at an honest price. This is smart luxury, reimagined.
